verdict: Good structure but incomplete and lacks risk assessment.
strengths: Clear objectives with priorities, deadlines, and owners
Current phase includes accomplishments and next steps
Team composition and development environment defined
weaknesses: Next steps section is truncated and incomplete
No risk assessment or mitigation strategies
Missing success metrics or KPIs for objectives
top_fixes: Complete the next steps section with detailed action items
Add a risk assessment table with mitigation plans
Define measurable success criteria for each objective
